component.name: Xeneon Edge Manager
component.summary: Configure and control your Xeneon Edge dashboard

description.p: Xeneon Edge Manager is the companion desktop app for the Xeneon Edge Linux Hub. It arranges the widgets, themes, backgrounds and display settings of the touchscreen dashboard from your main screen, with a live WYSIWYG preview of the Edge.

ul.li: Add, reorder, resize and remove widgets across pages, mirrored live to the Edge
Per-widget configuration with an instant preview
Themes, accent colours, animated backgrounds and wallpaper management
Start and stop the hub, over a local control socket

description.p: First signed alpha release of the companion Manager, with live Hub layout and appearance control.
Initial release of the companion manager.
